name: Term plan recommendation for 35-year-old
description: User asks for term insurance recommendation — must give grounded advice with disclaimer

input.message: I am 35 years old, earn ₹15 lakhs per year, married with 2 kids. I don't have any life insurance. How much term insurance should I take and which plan should I buy?

notes: Should recommend 10-15x income rule → ₹1.5-2.25 crore cover
